steps.title: Determine the conversion factor for seconds to hours
steps.content:
To convert miles per second to miles per hour, multiply by the number of seconds in one hour.
$$1 \text{ hour} = 60 \text{ minutes} \times 60 \text{ seconds/minute} = 3,600 \text{ seconds}$$

steps.title: Apply the conversion factor to find the speed in miles per hour
